envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your AION SDK API key from https://pm-t1.bxingupdate.com/agents

envVars.name: AION_BASE_URL
envVars.description: AION API base URL override (default: https://pm-t1.bxingupdate.com/bvapi)

envVars.name: WALLET_ADDRESS
envVars.description: Your wallet address for user-scoped briefing and live order submission

envVars.name: AION_SIGNED_ORDER_JSON
envVars.description: Pre-signed EIP712 order payload JSON string; required only for --live trading

envVars.name: MAX_MARKETS
envVars.description: Max markets to scan per cycle (default: 25)

envVars.name: MAX_STAKE_USD
envVars.description: Max stake per trade in USD (default: 50)

envVars.name: STARTING_BALANCE_USD
envVars.description: Fallback bankroll for dry-run when account balance unavailable (default: 1000)

envVars.name: AION_KELLY_MULTIPLIER
envVars.description: Kelly fraction multiplier for risk control (default: 0.25)

envVars.name: AION_MIN_EV
envVars.description: Minimum expected value for Kelly sizing (default: 0.03)
